title: helianthemum occidentale var. alyssoides
intro: Helianthemum occidentale var. alyssoides, also known as a western rockrose, is a flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum occidentale var. alyssoides include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
